description_long: This shotgun features a compact, bullpup-style design with a matte black finish and a robust, modern appearance. The main body is constructed from what appears to be a combination of metal and polymer, with a prominent integrated carrying handle and sight rail on top. The magazine is mounted horizontally above the trigger assembly, and the trigger is housed within a large, rounded trigger guard that also serves as a handgrip. The stock is integrated into the main body, forming a continuous, ergonomic shape with a thumbhole grip for improved handling. The barrel is relatively short and enclosed within the main body, with minimal external protrusions, giving the weapon a streamlined profile. The overall design suggests a focus on maneuverability and ease of use in close-quarters urban environments.
description: A compact, bullpup-style shotgun with a matte black finish, integrated carrying handle, and ergonomic thumbhole stock. Its streamlined, modern design emphasizes maneuverability and close-quarters use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, the integrated carrying handle, and the horizontal magazine above the trigger.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the sight rail, carrying handle, and the compact width of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the thumbhole stock and trigger guard.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the muzzle, sight alignment, and the symmetrical design of the handguard and stock.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, enclosed within the main body, no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: large, rounded, elongated trigger guard integrated with the grip and featuring a thumbhole design
